indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The vast open area lacks defined boundaries, making it difficult to establish a focused workspace.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or monitor.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No chairs or seating options are visible, making it impossible to sit comfortably while working.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout
indicators.rationale: The space is too open and lacks a clear layout that would support focused solo work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space and lack of flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and task lighting make it challenging to set up a productive workspace. The absence of a dedicated layout further undermines the potential for focused solo work.
